title: osteospermum microcarpum subsp. microcarpum
intro: Osteospermum microcarpum subsp. microcarpum, also known as the narrow-leaved daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Osteospermum microcarpum subsp. microcarpum are believed to include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of various health conditions, such as respiratory problems and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and flowers are used in herbal preparations, often in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
